use_cases: Showcasing product features and value propositions at the top of marketing pages
Creating compelling first impressions for SaaS and product landing pages
Displaying primary calls-to-action with primary and secondary buttons
Building brand identity through clean, professional hero layouts
Converting visitors with clear value messaging and CTA buttons
ai_summary: A versatile landing page hero section component featuring primary and secondary call-to-action buttons with hover states. Designed for maximum conversion with clean typography and professional layout. Part of the larsen66 design system with Radix UI integration for accessibility.
